shortDescription: German Embassy · Schengen short-stay · Tourism, family, business · 90/180 rule

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Schengen visa fee (€90 for adults) on auswaertiges-amt.de before quoting.

alert.title: Schengen 90/180 day rule
alert.body: Short-stay visa allows max 90 days in any 180-day period in Schengen area. Counsel clients on cumulative stay limits.

about.label: Description
about.value: Schengen Type C short-stay visa for tourism, family visits, or business trips to Germany up to 90 days per 180-day period.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Temporary visit purpose · Travel insurance €30,000+ · Funds for trip · Strong ties to India · Clean Schengen history

about.label: Main destination rule
about.value: Apply at embassy of main Schengen destination. If Germany is primary stay, apply via German mission.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: German Embassy/Consulate · VFS Global (appointment partner in India)

about.label: After approval
about.value: Respect visa validity and 90/180 rule. Overstay affects future Schengen applications.

redFlagsBanner: After Schengen refusal, analyse refusal letter and strengthen ties before reapplication to any Schengen state.

redFlags.title: Weak ties to India
redFlags.description: Unemployed, no assets, vague return plan.
redFlags.fix: Employment letter, business proof, property, family obligations

redFlags.title: Insufficient travel insurance
redFlags.fix: Purchase Schengen-compliant insurance for full trip dates

redFlags.title: Itinerary inconsistencies
redFlags.fix: Align bookings with cover letter dates

redFlags.title: Prior Schengen refusals
redFlags.description: Hidden refusals from other Schengen states.
redFlags.fix: Disclose all refusals; address in cover letter

redFlags.title: Wrong embassy application
redFlags.description: Applied Germany but main destination is another country.
redFlags.fix: Apply at main destination embassy per Schengen rules

faqs.a: No. Consulate decides each application individually.
Country of main destination or first entry if equal stays—follow Schengen rules.
Minimum €30,000 medical coverage valid across Schengen for entire trip.

faqs.q: Can I visit multiple Schengen countries?
faqs.a: Yes on single visa if main destination rule followed; respect 90/180 limit.
Typically 2–4 weeks; apply well before travel date.

faqs.q: Does prior UK/US refusal affect Schengen?
faqs.a: Must disclose; consulate considers overall immigration history.
No. Employment not permitted on Schengen short-stay visa.
Yes when circumstances improve; address prior refusal grounds.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Purchase Schengen insurance before VFS appointment
Personalise cover letter with exact dates and purpose
Check 90/180 rule if client has recent Schengen travel
postApproval: Remind to carry insurance and accommodation proof at border
Note reapplication if travel plans change

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial Germany Schengen visitor visa counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Check client Schengen travel history for 90/180 compliance before filing.

quiz.question: 90/180 rule means:
options: Max 90 days in any 180-day Schengen period

donts: Do not apply with wrong main destination
Do not advise working on tourist visa
mistakes: Insurance dates don't cover full trip
No employment proof for salaried applicant

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Show clients which pages to scan — MRZ visible, no glare, full spread.

sampleDocs.title: Sample bank statement (mock)
sampleDocs.description: 6-month statement with name, account number, and closing balance — explain seasoning.

sampleDocs.title: Sample invitation / sponsor letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Host details, relationship, accommodation, and duration of stay.

sampleDocs.title: Sample travel itinerary (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Flights, hotels, and day-wise plan for visitor visa credibility.

sampleDocs.title: Sample employment / NOC letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Employer letter confirming leave, role, salary, and return to India.

sampleDocs.title: Sample property / ties document (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Sale deed or tax receipt — explain home-country ties.
